Welcome.Title: Welcome to No Way Out! - 5e
Welcome.Message: This module makes D&D 5e more lethal and challenging. Configure settings in the Module Settings panel.

Enabled.Name: Enable Module
Enabled.Hint: Enable or disable all No Way Out! features globally.

Debug.Name: Debug Mode
Debug.Hint: Enable verbose console logging for development and troubleshooting.

OpenPanel.Name: Open Module Panel
OpenPanel.Hint: Opens the main No Way Out! configuration panel.
